overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with a green mohawk walking through the neon-lit streets of Night City at night. The character transitions from busy commercial intersections through narrow back alleys with red lighting and returns to main streets, showcasing the game's futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial intersection with food vendors

events.description: crosses the street at intersection, navigating around vehicles
turns left to follow the main character with green mohawk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, crossing the street, and turning to proceed down the road

notable_agents.action: muscular man in white tank top standing near food stall, gesturing with hands
futuristic car driving down the street at moderate speed

entered.detail: wooden counter with food items and cooking equipment on the sidewalk
large traditional red paper lantern hanging above the stall
bright yellow barriers lining the edge of the street
massive concrete overpass structure spanning across the street ahead
tall buildings covered with bright neon advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bustling Night City street corner with a food stall and red paper lantern. The player character crosses the asphalt street, navigating around sparse traffic, then turns to proceed down the road toward an elevated highway overpass. Neon billboards illuminate the background while a muscular NPC stands by the food vendor.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street under elevated highway with weapon shop

events.description: the followed character stops to look at weapon shop display, camera continues past

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and passing the green mohawk character who has stopped to browse a weapon shop window

notable_agents.action: green mohawk character in blue plaid jacket standing still, examining weapon shop display

entered.detail: storefront with glass windows displaying various firearms and weapons with red neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive elevated highway overpass, the scene becomes semi-covered with the concrete structure overhead. The player passes a weapon shop with glowing red neon displays where the green mohawk character stops to browse, while the camera continues forward along the commercial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with road closed barriers and advertisements

events.description: enters narrower alley section marked with road closed barriers

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrower street section with road closed barriers and large wall advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in red crop top and orange pants standing near advertisement mural

entered.detail: red and white striped barriers blocking vehicle access to the alley
building-sized digital murals and posters covering the walls
illuminated sign for Delamain corporation hanging above the street

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrower alleyway marked with red and white road closed barriers. Large advertisement murals cover the walls, including a prominent Delamain sign overhead. An NPC in bright clothing stands near the advertisements as the player walks deeper into the enclosed commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with industrial AC units and red neon lighting

events.description: lighting shifts to dominant red neon as entering deeper enclosed alley

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow trash-filled alley with red neon lighting and industrial air conditioning units

entered.detail: large external air conditioning fans and ventilation units mounted on walls
bright red neon signage and lighting casting red glow on walls
scattered newspapers, boxes, and litter covering the alley floor

segments.scene_description: Entering a deeply enclosed back alley, the lighting shifts to a dominant red neon glow. Industrial air conditioning units line the walls above scattered trash and debris. The narrow passage creates a sheltered, intimate atmosphere distinct from the open streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: building interior stairwell with burning barrel

events.description: enters building doorway from alley into interior stairwell
exits building back to street level near nightclub entrance

agents.ego_description: descending a stairwell past a burning barrel and exiting back to the main street near a nightclub entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in checkered bodysuit standing with hands on hips near burning barrel

entered.detail: metal sliding door leading into building interior
metal barrel with open fire burning inside, providing warm orange light
building entrance with bright blue and green neon lights and signage

segments.scene_description: The player enters a building doorway from the red-lit alley, descending a stairwell past a burning barrel that casts flickering orange light. A woman in a distinctive checkered outfit stands nearby. Exiting the building, the scene transitions back to street level near a nightclub entrance with bright blue neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with various shops and neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking along the neon-lit sidewalk passing various storefronts and street furniture

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground against wall near trash receptacle

entered.detail: multiple shop fronts with bright neon signs in various colors including red and cyan
public waste receptacles and debris along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Returning to the open commercial street, the player walks past various neon-lit storefronts with Korean and English signage. The sidewalk features street furniture including trash cans, while sparse pedestrians and vehicles populate the scene. The nightclub entrance remains visible as the player continues down the vibrant Night City street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the vibrant streets of Night City, transitioning from open commercial intersections into a claustrophobic red-lit alley before returning to the neon-drenched main road. It begins at a bustling street corner with a food stall and red lanterns, moving past sparse traffic and beneath a massive concrete highway overpass where glowing weapon shop displays line the path. As the camera pushes forward, the environment narrows into a commercial district marked by road barriers and large advertisement murals before shifting into a deeply enclosed back alley dominated by a moody red neon glow and industrial debris. The scene then descends through a building doorway past a flickering orange burning barrel, emerging from the shadows toward a nightclub entrance with bright blue signage. Finally, the view expands back onto the open sidewalk, passing a series of multilingual neon storefronts and street furniture as the character continues down the vibrant city street.
